About
The
Story
So Far

I'm Kunaal Telrandhe — a self-taught, self-proclaimed designer from Nagpur with two years of practice and zero formal training. My design journey started not in a classroom, but on the internet, when I launched a YouTube channel and needed to learn how to make people stop scrolling.

Today I work at the intersection of graphic design and digital marketing — building visuals that don't just look good, but actually perform. I've grown brand reach by 175%, run paid campaigns across Meta and Google, and designed everything from editorial posters to ad creatives for F&B and nightlife brands.

Currently pursuing an MBA in Digital Marketing at MIT World Peace University, while continuing to explore the edges of typography, collage, and visual storytelling.

"I create and delete — that's why I don't have a portfolio."
...until now.
